pi_items.metadata_value: Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts
pi_items.verified_value: Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts
pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Title to 'Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts'.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Priority to 'High'.
Task description explicitly includes '10.0.2.15', 'svc_backup', and 'svc_deploy' in the required description text.
Task description explicitly instructs the agent to set the Assignee to 'admin'.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the creation of a new synthetic security incident. The required Title is 'Brute Force Attempt on Service Accounts', the required Priority is 'High', the expected Assignee is 'admin', and the Description must contain the keywords '10.0.2.15', 'svc_backup', and 'svc_deploy'. All expected values are explicitly stated in the task description.
